description: Projects and document collections, resolved from what a document declares about itself. Alias matching is EXACT on word boundaries, never fuzzy: binding a risk register to the wrong project would silently satisfy the wrong prerequisite and pollute every cross-project aggregate.

schemaContract.reason: A cross-project aggregate unions members. A member missing a contract column cannot be unioned and is excluded and reported, not silently coerced.
Rating scales must be comparable across members before they can be aggregated.
